svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="工程化流水线" id="pipeline"> <mxGraphModel dx="-564" dy="-139" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="从改一行代码到 npm publish:Nx 任务图怎么编排骨架" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="700" x="250" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="① 开发
pnpm dev
pnpm storybook" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="40" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="源码直连:
@luban-ui/source 条件
改 base 立刻在 low-code 见效" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="40" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="② 静态检查
typecheck (tsc --noEmit)
lint (eslint)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="240" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="strict: true
类型不过 = 红灯" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="180" x="240" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="③ 单元测试
pnpm test:base
pnpm test:lowcode
Vitest + jsdom" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="460" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="每个组件一个 spec
dependsOn: ^build" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="180" x="460" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="④ 包内 E2E
test:base:e2e
test:lowcode:e2e
隔离的 vitest 配置" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="680" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="⑤ 应用 E2E
pnpm test:e2e
Cypress" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="900" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fee2e2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="⑥ build + publish
nx run-many -t build
npm publish --access public" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="380" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=10;" value="publish.dependsOn: [build, test]
任一环节红 = 不允许 publish" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="320" x="380" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f1" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;" target="s2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;" target="s3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f3" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;" target="s4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f4" edge="1" parent="1" source="s4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;" target="s5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f5" edge="1" parent="1" source="s5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#dc2626;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#dc2626;" target="s6" value="①~⑤ 全绿"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="970" y="270" /> <mxPoint x="700" y="270" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cache" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" value="Nx 缓存:同一个 target + 输入未变 → 直接复用上次产物,跳过执行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="320" x="40" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="parallel" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" value="并行:无依赖的包 (luban-base, luban-utils) 并行构建/测试" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="320" x="720" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
